summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Execution Blueprint startup validation platform. Backend APIs working well (91.7% success rate), frontend UI functional with good user flows. Some minor authentication and navigation issues identified.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Fallback login test failed with non-existent credentials
flaky_endpoints.impact: Expected behavior - test used invalid credentials

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login occasionally doesn't redirect properly in automated tests

integration_issues.issue: Results page requires proper authentication - direct URL access blocked

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all CTAs and navigation
User signup flow creates account with 1 credit
Dashboard displays credits and submission count correctly
Admin panel accessible with proper credentials
Admin panel tabs (submissions, users, requests, logs) functional
Expert notes and score editing functional
Warning flags generation based on pillar thresholds
30-day action plan templates by execution mode
All 5 results page sections structure present
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvements needed: 1) Ensure consistent HTTP status codes (401 vs 403), 2) Improve login flow reliability in automated testing scenarios. Overall system is working well.
